name: epicd
description: epicd skill set: operation skills (propose, promote, inbox, run, init), lifecycle skills (primitive-executor, adjudicate, exploration-spike, authoring-draft, authoring-refining), and methodology skills (fixpoint-convergence, epicd-run). execution/implementing folds decompose in as an internal branch (epic-decompose retired as a standalone skill — BACK-686.3); execution/evaluating is retired, folded into the execution/adjudicating gate (BACK-686.2/.3).
